globalNews.title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
globalNews.summary: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.

globalNews.title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
globalNews.summary: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.

globalNews.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
globalNews.summary: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.

globalNews.title: Russian strikes kill 10 as Zelensky says Ukraine hits oil tankers and terminal
globalNews.summary: Fatalities have been reported around Ukraine as Kyiv says Russian "shadow fleet" tankers were hit by drones.

globalNews.summary: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy takes Bitcoin buying breather ahead of Q1 earnings report
cryptoNews.summary: Michael Saylor signaled a “pause” on BTC buying ahead of Tuesday’s earnings report, with Wall Street expecting a loss for Q1.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin preps highest weekly close since January as BTC price nears $79K
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin canceled out the week's earlier losses to tease the highest BTC price weekly candle close since the end of January near $79,000.

cryptoNews.title: Americans distrust crypto, AI as industry super PACs flood midterms, poll finds
cryptoNews.summary: A new Politico poll finds most Americans distrust crypto and AI, raising questions about whether candidates backed by industry super PACs could face voter backlash.

cryptoNews.title: Iran’s largest crypto exchange founded by sons of family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
cryptoNews.summary: Nobitex, Iran’s largest crypto exchange, was founded by brothers linked to the powerful Kharrazi family, which has ties to the country’s supreme leaders.

aiNews.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
aiNews.summary: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

aiNews.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
aiNews.summary: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.
